chain_parts.name: Bicycle Chain
chain_parts.description: S-56: CHAIN 1/2" X 3/32" (MTB OR RACER) | S-57: CHAIN 1/2" X 1/8" (REGULAR)

specifications.finish: AVAILABLE IN BLACK, NP AND BCP FINISH

chain_parts.visual_notes: Shows two precision parallel-link chains. S-56 (narrower, multi-speed) and S-57 (wider, single-speed), both in black finish.

chain_parts.name: Chain Connecting Links
chain_parts.visual_notes: Small black master link / connecting link. Includes open and closed link variants.

chain_parts.name: Chain Roll
chain_parts.visual_notes: Heavy-duty bulk spool of black chain with a four-armed cross-brace structure on a wire stand.

chain_parts.name: Shelco Cut Chain Wheel
chain_parts.visual_notes: Classic single-speed crankset with a bright chrome 48T chainring with decorative cut windows and a polished 7" round chrome crank arm.

chain_parts.name: Triple Chain Wheel with Black Guard
chain_parts.description: TRIPLE CHAIN WHEEL WITH BLACK GUARD AND GREY PLASTIC COATED CRANK
chain_parts.visual_notes: Modern multi-speed crankset with three chainrings (28/38/48T), integrated black plastic bash guard and grey plastic-coated crank arm.

chain_parts.name: Single Speed Freewheel
chain_parts.visual_notes: Single-speed freewheel cog, 18 teeth, smooth polished chrome silky finish. Features engraved SHELCO and TO UNSCREW text with directional arrow.

chain_parts.name: Cotter Pin Set
chain_parts.description: COTTER PIN SHORT CUT AND LONG CUT

specifications.nut_types: AVAILABLE WITH NYLOCK, DOM AND FLANGE NUT

chain_parts.visual_notes: Hardware kit with four silver cotter pins in short and long cut varieties, plus silver washer/nut. Used for traditional crank arm attachment.

chain_parts.name: Multispeed Freewheel Opener
chain_parts.visual_notes: Two specialized socket removal tools. S-53: gold-colored socket with internal splines. S-54: standard silver-colored socket with internal splines.

chain_parts.name: Chain Adjuster Open End
chain_parts.visual_notes: Pair of silver zinc-plated chain adjusters for BMX or single-speed bikes with horizontal dropouts. Features a hooked open tensioning bolt end.

chain_parts.name: Chain Adjuster Close End
chain_parts.visual_notes: Pair of silver chain adjusters with a solid circular closed end eyelet on the tensioning bolt, as opposed to the hooked end on S-51.

chain_parts.name: 6 Speed Freewheel Cluster
chain_parts.visual_notes: Complete multi-speed freewheel cluster with six cogs (14-28T range). Distinctive deep semi-gloss brown/bronze chemical finish. Shown from 3/4 angle.

specifications.crank_sizes: 3.5" X 0.7" (C TO C) WITH THREE HOLES

specifications.compatibility: SINGLE SPEED SUITABLE FOR ONE PC CRANK 36T, 40T, 44T

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Single Speed Chainwheel with Plastic Chain Guard
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: SINGLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH PLASTIC CHAIN GUARD
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: All-black component. The main chainring is covered by a matte black plastic disc guard. The crank arm is a matching deep black.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Double Speed Chainwheel with Steel Chain Guard (Cottered)
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: DOUBLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH STEEL CHAIN GUARD (COTTERED)
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Traditional chrome double crankset with decorative cutouts and a chrome steel plate chain guard. Bright polished chrome crank arm, cottered bottom bracket design.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel with Steel Chain Guard (Cottered)
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH STEEL CHAIN GUARD (COTTERED)
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with three bright chrome chainrings and a chrome steel plate chain guard. Bright polished chrome crank arm, cottered bottom bracket design.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel Plastic Coated Spider Crank with Plastic Chain Guard
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL PLASTIC COATED SPIDER CRANK WITH PLASTIC CHAIN GUARD
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with matte black plastic disc chain guard. Silver/light grey plastic-coated crank arm, cotterless (square taper) mounting. Inner rings are silver steel.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel with Steel Chain Guard (Cotterless)
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH STEEL CHAIN GUARD (COTTERLESS)
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with highly polished chrome steel plate chain guard. Bright polished chrome crank arm, cotterless (square taper) mounting. Silver steel rings.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Triple Chainwheel with Plastic Chain Guard (Cotterless)
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: TRIPLE CHAINWHEEL WITH PLASTIC CHAIN GUARD (COTTERLESS)
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Entirely deep black triple crankset. Matte black plastic disc chain guard on outermost gear. Solid deep black crank arm, cotterless mounting. Inner rings also black steel.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel All Black with PVC Crank and Chain Guard
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL ALL BLACK WITH PVC CRANK AND CHAIN GUARD
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Completely deep matte black triple crankset with a solid matte black plastic disc chain guard. PVC/plastic crank arm in matching deep matte black. All rings are black steel.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Triple Speed Chainwheel with Silver Grey Powder Coated Crank
multi_speed_chainwheels.description: TRIPLE SPEED CHAINWHEEL WITH SILVER GREY POWDER COATED CRANK
multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Triple crankset with no chain guard. Three visible black steel chainrings. Defining feature is the silver-grey powder-coated crank arm. Cotterless (square taper) mounting.

multi_speed_chainwheels.name: Assorted Crank Arms

variants.A: Cottered Crank CP - Bright chrome, traditional cotter-pin mounting hole
variants.B: Cotterless Crank Black Powder Coated - Deep matte black, square taper mounting
variants.C: Cotterless Crank PVC Grey Plate Type - Light grey plastic-coated, cotterless mounting
variants.D: Silver Grey Powder Coated - Silver-grey finish, cotterless mounting

multi_speed_chainwheels.visual_notes: Four distinct replacement crank arms laid out horizontally: chrome cottered, black powder coated, grey PVC, and silver-grey powder coated.

hubs.name: Philips Hub Set
hubs.description: PHILIPS STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Thick barrel, axle 3/8" X 5.5", 36 Spoke Holes
specifications.rear: Thick barrel, axle 3/8" X 6.5", 36 Spoke Holes. Thread 1.370 X 24 TPI BSCY

hubs.visual_notes: Traditional robust hub set with solid matte black barrel and bright silver axle ends. Standard 14G large flanges.

hubs.name: Raleigh Hub Set
hubs.description: RALEIGH STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Thin barrel, Hub Axle 5/16" X 5.5" or 6"
specifications.rear: Thin barrel, Hub Axle 3/8" X 6.5", 36 Spoke Holes. 1.370 X 24 TPI BSCY or 34.7 X 1mm pitch

hubs.visual_notes: Elegant minimalist hub set with continuous thin polished chrome barrel and matching chrome bolt-on axles. Small flanges.

hubs.name: Oval Hub Set
hubs.description: OVAL STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Open ends, BCP, Hub Axle 3/8" X 5.5"

hubs.visual_notes: Defined by smooth oval/barrel-shaped central body. Large circular flanges.

hubs.name: Under Cut Hub Set
hubs.description: UNDER CUT STYLE FRONT & REAR HUB SET

specifications.front: Open ends, BCP Hub Axle 3/8" X 5.5"

hubs.visual_notes: Heavy-duty MTB style hub with larger central barrel that steps down in diameter at the flanges. Large circular flanges.

hubs.name: Rickshaw Hub
hubs.visual_notes: Extreme duty, high-spoke count hub with massive wide central barrel. Unique decorative rectangular speed-holes cut into large flanges. Heavy-duty axle with large cone nuts.

hubs.name: MTB Quick Release Oval Hub Set (Golden)
hubs.description: MTB QUICK RELEASE OVAL HUB SET

specifications.rear: 3/8" X 136, Thread 34.8 X 24 TPI, Across Nut 96/98/100
specifications.axle_type: 5mm Quick Release skewer (Silver skewer, Black handle)

hubs.visual_notes: Performance MTB set with continuous simple oval central barrel in a deep reflective golden finish. Includes silver and black quick-release skewers. Simple clean flanges.

hubs.name: MTB Quick Release Oval Hub Set (Chrome)
hubs.description: MTB QUICK RELEASE OVAL HUB SET

specifications.rear: 3/8" X 136, Thread 34.8 X 24 TPI, Across Nut 96/98/100
specifications.axle_type: 5mm Quick Release skewer (Silver skewer, Black handle)

hubs.visual_notes: Identical structure to S-95 (performance MTB, continuous oval body) but with flawless deep polished chrome finish. Includes silver and black quick-release skewers.

hubs.name: Hub Step / Axle Peg Set
hubs.description: HUB STEP WITH HEXAGON BOTTOM & HUB STEP WITH COLOURED LINES (ALSO AVAILABLE IN ALUMINIUM)

specifications.left_step: Full knurling, smooth rounded bottom with internal hexagon interface
specifications.right_step: Reduced/partial knurling at top, smooth barrel with horizontal cut lines (coloured red/blue/gold)

hubs.visual_notes: Heavy-duty steps with varied surfaces for grip and style. Polished chrome (BCP) with subtle colored details on the right step.

hub_axles.name: Raleigh Type Hub Axle Set

specifications.finish: Available in Black, NP, or ZP

hub_axles.visual_notes: Standard threaded axle pair with cones, nuts, and washers. Dark grey/black finish.

hub_axles.name: A Model Hub Axle Set

specifications.finish: Available in Black, NP, or ZP

hub_axles.visual_notes: Standard threaded axle pair in silver-toned (NP or ZP) finish, complete with standard nuts and cones.

hub_axles.name: Raleigh Type Old Model Axle
hub_axles.visual_notes: Single threaded axle with highly polished finish on the axle, cones, and standard hexagon nuts.

hub_axles.name: Feather Type Axle with Dust Cap
hub_axles.description: FEATHER TYPE WITH DUST CAP, FRONT & REAR
hub_axles.visual_notes: Distinguished by black cones and standard nuts with a black dust cap assembly. Front axle features a larger extended black dust cover. Black steel axles.

hub_axles.name: Multi Speed Hub Axle
hub_axles.visual_notes: Silver-toned (NP or ZP) axle pair. Rear axle is significantly longer with extended section to accommodate multi-speed freewheel clusters. Silver cones and standard nuts.

hub_axles.name: Cart Hub Axle
hub_axles.visual_notes: Heavy-duty single large-diameter black-finished axle assembly with large-diameter black cones/cups and oversized silver-toned hexagon nuts and check nuts.

hub_axles.name: Quick Release Hub Axle Set
hub_axles.description: QUICK RELEASE WITH HUB AXLE, FRONT & REAR
hub_axles.visual_notes: Full hub axle replacement set integrated with quick-release skewers. Black hollow-core axles with matching black internal cones. Black QR handles.

hub_axles.name: Quick Release Skewer Set
hub_axles.description: QUICK RELEASE FOR HUB, FRONT & REAR
hub_axles.visual_notes: Pair of traditional 5mm quick-release skewers with thin silver-toned shafts, silver acorn nuts and springs at both ends, and distinct black handles.

hub_axles.name: Hub Cup Rear
hub_axles.visual_notes: Large-diameter polished metallic bearing cup with distinct copper/brass tone. Designed as outer bearing race for rear hub with smooth ground interior bearing track.

hub_axles.name: Hub Cup Front 5/16"
hub_axles.visual_notes: Identical structure to S-108 but smaller diameter for 5/16" front hub axles. Same copper/brass tone polished finish.

hub_axles.name: Hub Cone Front 5/16"
hub_axles.visual_notes: Small silver-toned threaded bearing cone with hexagonal section for adjustment and precision-ground curved bearing race, sized for 5/16" front axle.

hub_axles.name: Hub Cone Rear
hub_axles.visual_notes: Identical to S-110 but sized for larger 3/8" rear axle with larger diameter and internal thread. Silver-toned metallic finish.

bb_axles_cups.name: B.B. Axle - Phillips Type
bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Polished silver/chrome metallic finish with raised shoulders and a cotter pin notch near the right end.

bb_axles_cups.name: B.B. Axle - Raleigh Type
bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Two-toned metallic axle with a blackened/dark central section between the bearing shoulders and notched ends for cotter pins.

bb_axles_cups.name: B.B. Axle - French Type
bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Entirely matte black/dark finished cottered axle with standard notches at both ends.

bb_axles_cups.name: MTB Cotterless Axle
bb_axles_cups.description: MTB COTTERLESS AXLE WITH WASHERS & BOLTS
bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Matte black square-tapered axle complete with threaded bolts and washers pre-installed on both ends.

bb_axles_cups.name: Thomson Type B.B. Axle & Cup Set
bb_axles_cups.description: THOMSON TYPE B.B. AXLE & CUP SET

specifications.components: Includes axle, integrated cups, and threaded hardware

bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Complete bottom bracket assembly showing the central axle fitted with pressed flared metal cups, threaded cones, and locknuts.

bb_axles_cups.name: B.B. Cups - Philips Type

specifications.threads: 34.8 MM x 24 TPI BSCY RH & LH THREADS
specifications.alternative_sizes: Also available in 35 MM & 35.5 MM diameter

bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Silver-toned metallic threaded cup alongside a thin, notched outer lockring.

bb_axles_cups.name: B.B. Cups - Raleigh Type

specifications.threads: 34.8 MM x 26 TPI / 24 TPI BSCY RH & LH THREADS

bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Metallic bottom bracket cup accompanied by a notched lockring and a thick, black rubberized or plastic seal ring.

bb_axles_cups.name: B.B. Cups - French Type

specifications.threads: 35 MM x 1 MM PITCH ISO - METRIC RH & RH THREADS

bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Metallic stepped cup, a minimal notched lockring, and a thick black cylindrical spacing ring.

bb_axles_cups.name: MTB for Cotterless Axle Cups

specifications.finish: Black or Z/P (Zinc Plated) with washers & bolts

bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Hexagonal flanged metallic cup, a thin notched lockring, and a flat silver washers plate.

bb_axles_cups.name: Ball Retainer for B.B. Sets & Hubs
bb_axles_cups.description: BALL RETAINER FOR B.B. SETS & HUBS IN 7, 8, 9 BALLS
bb_axles_cups.visual_notes: Two circular caged ball bearing retainers displaying evenly spaced chrome steel balls.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - SLR Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Bright red bicycle fork with a metallic steerer tube and curved, slender blades featuring chrome/BCP thimbles at the crown.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - Raleigh Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Black bicycle fork featuring a curved blade design and distinctive bright BCP/chrome thimbles at the fork crown.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - Philips Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Elongated black fork designed for traditional roadster bicycles, featuring a shiny chrome crown cap and curved dropouts.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - Double Pipe
front_forks.visual_notes: Heavy-duty black fork featuring a classic twin-tube or double-pipe crown structure reminiscent of vintage Robin Hood styles.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - French Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Bright blue painted bicycle fork with clean, tapered lines and classic curved blades ending in open dropouts.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - Robinhood Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Dark blue variant of the dual-pipe reinforced fork crown structure, built for large 28-inch wheels.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - MTB with Pivots
front_forks.description: MTB WITH PIVOTS PRESSED / FORGED ENDS
front_forks.visual_notes: Red mountain bike style fork with integrated brake boss pivots protruding on the inner blades, featuring thick forged dropouts.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - MTB 26"
front_forks.visual_notes: Sleek, dark-painted or black rigid mountain bike fork with contoured oval blades optimized for 26-inch wheels.

front_forks.name: Front Fork - BMX
front_forks.visual_notes: Compact, stout pink/magenta BMX fork featuring thick, heavily reinforced multi-hole peg/dropout plates at the blade tips.

front_forks.name: Fork Guard
front_forks.visual_notes: A pair of long, slender, chrome-plated spring steel rods with tightly coiled accent sections near the mounting ends.

front_forks.name: Fork Fittings - Raleigh Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Vertical stack of 5 headset components consisting of a locknut, threaded top race, keyed washers, and bottom races in mixed chrome and dark finishes.

front_forks.name: Fork Fittings - BMX Set
front_forks.visual_notes: Stack of 5 robust BMX headset pieces including a thick black spacer ring, notched lock ring, and heavy-set metallic cups.

front_forks.name: Fork Fittings - French Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Set of 6 polished silver-toned headset components featuring fine threading and low-profile lockrings.

front_forks.name: Fork Fittings - Zebra / Swedish Set
front_forks.visual_notes: A collection of 6 dark-coated and silver metallic concentric hardware rings including a flared lower cone race.

front_forks.name: Fork Fittings - Philip Type
front_forks.visual_notes: Comprehensive 7-piece headset stack displaying varying profiles of threaded rings, flat keyed washers, and bearing race cups.

front_forks.name: Fork Fittings - Italian Type
front_forks.description: ITALIAN TYPE SET OF 8 PCS WITH BALL RETAINER.
front_forks.visual_notes: Premium 8-piece kit uniquely showing integrated caged ball bearing retainers nested among the polished cups and threaded lock hardware.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - NRR Model
handle_bars.description: NRR MODEL BCP WITH SIDE PULL BRAKES
handle_bars.visual_notes: Traditional upright chrome handlebar with an integrated stem, fitted with black end grips and dual side-pull brake rod levers running parallel to the main bar.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - Raleigh Model
handle_bars.description: RALEIGH MODEL BCP CENTRE PULL BRAKES
handle_bars.visual_notes: Chrome-plated tourist-style handlebar with integrated rod linkages configured centrally for traditional center-pull roller brakes.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - Philips Type
handle_bars.description: PHILIPS TYPE BCP WITH SIDE PULL BRAKES
handle_bars.visual_notes: Classic swept-back bright chrome handlebar with integrated stem assembly and dual side-pull brake rod linkages.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - SLR
handle_bars.description: SLR BCP WITH PVC GRIPS & ADJUSTABLE STEM
handle_bars.visual_notes: Slightly swept-back sports-style chrome handlebar featuring clear or light-toned PVC hand grips and an adjustable clamp-style forward stem.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - MTB Bent Pattern
handle_bars.description: MTB BENT PATTERN WITH ADJUSTABLE MTB STEM
handle_bars.visual_notes: Slightly raised or riser-style chrome mountain bike handlebar complete with textured black rubber grips and a sturdy black adjustable stem.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - Balloon Type
handle_bars.description: BALOON TYPE BCP WITH SIDE PULL BRAKES
handle_bars.visual_notes: Wide, flat-profile chrome handlebar designed for balloon-tire cruiser bikes, featuring integrated long-reach side-pull brake levers and black hand grips.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - BMX
handle_bars.visual_notes: High-rise chrome BMX handlebar with a welded horizontal reinforcement crossbar, fitted with vibrant red ribbed safety grips.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - MTB Straight Pattern
handle_bars.visual_notes: Minimalist, flat straight-line black/dark finished handlebar with extended black textured grips and a simple central stem clamp area.

handle_bars.name: Handle Bar - Reverse Model (Racing)
handle_bars.visual_notes: Classic dropped racing handlebar with deep down-turned hooks, a bright chrome finish, black rubber sleeve grips on the drops, and an integrated quill stem.

handle_parts.name: Handle Stem - MTB Regular
handle_parts.visual_notes: Matte black quill stem with a textured, wedge-cut bottom expander and a standard single-bolt front handlebar clamp.

handle_parts.name: Handle Stem - MTB with Cable Guide
handle_parts.description: HANDLE STAMPS : MTB WITH CABLE GUIDE
handle_parts.visual_notes: Dark finished bicycle quill stem featuring an integrated internal routing hole or guide loop for center-pull brake cables near the bend.

handle_parts.name: Handle Stem - Zoom with Cable Guide
handle_parts.description: HANDLE STAMPS : ZOOM WITH CABLE GUIDE
handle_parts.visual_notes: Elongated matte black quill stem with a sharp forward extension, equipped with an integrated brake cable routing guide.

handle_parts.name: Handle Stem - SLR
handle_parts.visual_notes: Polished chrome-plated vintage quill stem with a short forward neck and a standard binder bolt.

handle_parts.name: Handle Stem - Deep Drop Racer Bar
handle_parts.description: HANDLE STAMPS : DEEP DROP RACER BAR
handle_parts.visual_notes: Bright chrome-plated road racing quill stem with an elongated forward extension and specialized binder clamp for drop bars.

handle_parts.name: Handle Stem - BMX with Alloy Top
handle_parts.description: HANDLE STAMPS : BMX WITH ALLOY TOP
handle_parts.visual_notes: Chrome-plated quill shaft paired with a blocky, 4-bolt red anodized alloy faceplate/top clamp designed for BMX bars.

handle_parts.name: Expander Bolt - One Piece Hollow BCP
handle_parts.description: EXPANDER BOLT : ONE PIECE HOLLOW BCP EXPANDER BOLT
handle_parts.visual_notes: Long, silver-finished hollow tension bolt with threaded end, used to secure the stem inside the fork steerer.

handle_parts.name: Expander Bolt - Hexagonal Head with Swaged Cone & Washer
handle_parts.description: EXPANDER BOLT : HEXAGONAL HEAD WITH SWAGED CONE & WASHER
handle_parts.visual_notes: Long metallic bolt featuring a standard external hex head on top and a pre-fitted wedge-shaped swaged cone at the bottom.

handle_parts.name: Expander Bolt - Allen Head with Swaged Cone
handle_parts.description: EXPANDER BOLT : ALLEN HEAD WITH SWAGED CONE
handle_parts.visual_notes: Sleek expander bolt with a recessed internal hex (Allen) head and an attached mechanical expansion wedge.

handle_parts.name: Expander Bolt - Hexagonal with Tapered Cone & Washer
handle_parts.description: EXPANDER BOLT : HEXAGONAL WITH TAPERED CONE & WASHER
handle_parts.visual_notes: Long stem bolt with a hexagonal head, featuring a flat washer and a distinct smooth tapered round expansion cone.

handle_parts.name: Expander Bolt - Hexagonal
handle_parts.visual_notes: Standard elongated hex-head stem bolt fitted with a simple black spacer block/bushing along the upper shaft.

handle_parts.name: Reflector Brackets
handle_parts.visual_notes: Stamped metallic sheet brackets with circular mounting holes, designed to mount safety reflectors onto the frame or fork.

handle_parts.name: Lamp Brackets
handle_parts.visual_notes: Polished metal brackets featuring patterned cutouts (including shapes like 'S' and 'H') on the upper extension for traditional headlamp mounting.

handle_parts.name: Handle Grips
handle_parts.description: HANDLE GRIPS : ALL MODELS OF HANDLE GRIPS ARE MADE OUT OF PP / PVC, SOFT FOAM AND CUSHIONED
handle_parts.visual_notes: An assortment of bicycle handlebar grips displaying various styles, including smooth tapered cylinders, ergonomic molded contours, ribbed patterns, a bright yellow option (S-188), a blue flanged option (S-196), and multi-colored stacked ring styles (S-198, S-199).

break_sets_break_parts.name: Caliper Brakes - SLR Type
break_sets_break_parts.description: CALIPER BRAKES : SLR TYPE - COMPLETE WITH SHEET METAL LEVERS, SIDE PULL, POWDER COATED / BNCP.
break_sets_break_parts.visual_notes: A complete brake assembly kit displaying two bright chrome-plated side-pull calipers with brake pads, corresponding sheet metal drop-style brake levers, black outer brake cables, and mounting hardware.

break_sets_break_parts.name: Caliper Brakes - MTB/BMX Type
break_sets_break_parts.description: CALIPER BRAKES : FOR MTB/BMX BIKES - SIDE PULL, HIGH DENSITY STEEL MADE. SOLID LEVERS, BNCP/POWDER COATED
break_sets_break_parts.visual_notes: A brake kit featuring black-coated heavy-duty steel side-pull caliper arms, sturdy black solid-style hand brake levers, black cable housings, and silver hardware components.

break_sets_break_parts.name: Cantilever Brakes Set
break_sets_break_parts.description: CANTILEVER BRAKES : COMPLETE SET LOW PROFILE, ADJUSTER VERTICALLY & HORIZONTALLY, RIGID STEEL ARMS. POWDER COATED/BNCP.
break_sets_break_parts.visual_notes: A breakdown of a complete low-profile cantilever brake system, showing four black rigid brake arms with adjustable post-mount brake pads, black brake levers, straddle cables with carrier links, and pivoting mounting bolts.

break_sets_break_parts.name: Philips Type Brake Set
break_sets_break_parts.visual_notes: Traditional rod-operated side-pull brake linkage set featuring long silver chrome-plated pull rods, mounting frame clips, guided horseshoe stirrups with brake blocks, and mechanical lever pivoting connections.

break_sets_break_parts.name: Demi Balloon Brake Set
break_sets_break_parts.visual_notes: Polished chrome caliper assembly consisting of standard horseshoe calipers, matching silver metal handle levers, and thin coiled brake cables.

break_sets_break_parts.name: Raleigh Type Roadstar Brake Set
break_sets_break_parts.description: RALEIGH TYPE SUITABLE FOR ROADSTAR BIKES, CENTRE PULL

specifications.type: Centre Pull Roller Rod Brake Set

break_sets_break_parts.visual_notes: A comprehensive vintage-style center-pull rod brake mechanism layout, featuring prominent triangular stirrups, extended chrome connection rods, frame mounting clamps, and specialized horizontal rubber pad shoe blocks.

brake_levers.name: Brake Levers Assortment
brake_levers.description: BRAKE LEVERS : VARIOUS MODELS FROM A TO M PLASTIC COATED, BCP AND POWDER COATED
brake_levers.visual_notes: An expansive line-up of thirteen unique bicycle hand brake levers labeled A through M. Models A, B, and C display high-shine chrome (BCP) metal finishes; models D, E, F, H, I, J, K, L, and M feature matte or glossy black coated designs; and model G shows a distinct translucent white or light-yellow plastic composite body.

break_shoes.name: Brake Shoes Assortment
break_shoes.description: BRAKE SHOES : VARIOUS MODELS FROM A TO P
break_shoes.visual_notes: A grid matrix showcasing fifteen varieties of black rubber bicycle brake blocks/shoes with integrated metal mounting posts or threaded studs, labeled letters A through P (omitting L). Shapes vary across short caliper pads, traditional curved blocks, blocky shapes, and elongated smooth/ribbed mountain bike or cruiser style pads.

saddles.name: Heavy Duty Leather Saddle
saddles.description: LEATHER TOP HEAVY DUTY WITH 2 HIGH TENSION & 4 COMPRESSION SPRING, STEEL BASE
saddles.visual_notes: Traditional black leather bicycle saddle with metal rivets around the rear rim, supported by a heavy-duty steel undercarriage featuring two prominent rear barrel-shaped compression springs.

saddles.name: Leather Top Saddle - 2 Springs
saddles.description: LEATHER TOP WITH 2 HIGH TENSION SPRINGS
saddles.visual_notes: Sleek black textured leather saddle with rear structural rivets and a bright chrome under-chassis utilizing two vertical high-tension coil springs at the back.

saddles.name: Leather Top Saddle - Single Coil
saddles.description: LEATHER TOP WITH SINGLE COIL SPRING
saddles.visual_notes: Vintage brown leather saddle featuring ventilation/decorative punch holes on the surface, rear metal rivets, and a minimalist chrome wire support frame with a single nose/rear coil structure.

saddles.name: Leather Top Saddle - Tripple Coil
saddles.description: LEATHER TOP WITH TRIPPLE COIL SPRING
saddles.visual_notes: Contoured black leather roadster saddle accented with polished silver rivets, built on an intricate three-point coil spring under-frame assembly.

saddles.name: Vinyl Top Saddle - Plastic Base
saddles.description: VINYL TOP WITH 3 COIL SPRING (PLASTIC BASE)
saddles.visual_notes: Smooth, matte black seamless vinyl touring saddle with a broad rear profile, supported by a hidden plastic shell base and three structural chassis coils.

saddles.name: MTB Vinyl Top Saddle
saddles.description: MTB VINYL TOP WITH 2 SINGLE COIL SPRING WITH TOOL BAG LOOP
saddles.visual_notes: Ergonomic black vinyl mountain bike saddle with a narrow nose, single coil rear dampening springs, and integrated wire hooks at the rear base for fastening a tool bag.

saddles.name: MTB Vinyl Saddle - Rear Single Coil
saddles.description: MTB VINYL TOP WITH REAR SINGLE COIL SPRING
saddles.visual_notes: All-black sporty vinyl saddle with an angular drop-nose design, suspended by horizontal dual rail wires connected to a rear single coil layout.

saddles.name: MTB Vinyl Saddle - Double Action
saddles.description: MTB VINYL TOP WITH DOUBLE ACTION COIL SPRING
saddles.visual_notes: Thickly cushioned black vinyl mountain-style saddle featuring a small nameplate insert on the rear edge, sitting on a heavy-duty double-action dual coil base suspension.

saddles.name: Scooter Type Saddle
saddles.visual_notes: Wide-flared black vinyl cushion seat mimicking a moped/scooter profile, featuring a steep angled nose line and vertical rear dampening tension springs.

saddles.name: SLR Two Tone Saddle
saddles.description: SLR, TWO TONE SINGLE COIL SPRING
saddles.visual_notes: A distinctive short-profile sports saddle featuring a two-toned top cover dominated by a bright blue central section, built over a simple chrome single coil rail frame.

saddles.name: MTB Vinyl Saddle - 2 Springs
saddles.description: MTB, VINYL TOP WITH 2 SINGLE COIL SPRING
saddles.visual_notes: Ergonomically contoured all-black plush vinyl mountain bike saddle with a deep central relief profile and dual coiled spring rails underneath.

saddles.name: French Model Vinyl Saddle
saddles.description: FRENCH MODEL VINYL TOP SINGLE COIL SPRING STEEL BASE
saddles.visual_notes: Elegant, narrow French-pattern touring saddle with a textured matte tan/rose-gold vinyl top cover, a riveted rear edge, and an under-slung steel single-coil rail base.

saddle_parts.name: MTB Saddle - Golden Eagle
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Sleek black mountain bike saddle featuring stylized pink flame/wing graphics on the top and the text 'GOLDEN EAGLE' printed along the side.

saddle_parts.name: BMX Kid Saddle with Reflector
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Children's BMX saddle featuring a vibrant multi-colored abstract camouflage pattern in shades of blue, purple, yellow, and orange, fitted with a rear safety reflector.

saddle_parts.name: MTB Saddle - Double Cushion
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Thickly padded, deep-profile matte black mountain bike saddle designed for comfort, complete with an amber reflector tucked underneath the rear lip.

saddle_parts.name: MTB Saddle - Cobra
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Aerodynamic mountain bike saddle with a subtle dark brown or textured charcoal shimmer finish, featuring a clean, seamless cover.

saddle_parts.name: BMX Standard Saddle
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Classic, low-profile unpadded or slim-molded hard black composite/vinyl BMX saddle with an aggressive downward-sloping nose.

saddle_parts.name: MTB Sleek Saddle
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Slimline, lightweight black mountain bike saddle featuring a streamlined profile and an amber safety reflector embedded on the lower rear side.

saddle_parts.name: BMX Fire Saddle
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Bright pink/red racing-style saddle decorated with yellow and orange flame graphics creeping up the nose, complete with an integrated rear reflector.

saddle_parts.name: BMX Eagle Saddle with Cushion
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Bright yellow cushioned BMX saddle decorated with an elaborate blue and green cartoon eagle graphic near the nose and 'BMX ACTION' printed on the rear flank.

saddle_parts.name: BMX Gold Line Saddle
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Slim, upward-swept racing saddle featuring a striking black, white, and red split geometric design accented by metallic gold swoosh stripes.

saddle_parts.name: Saddle Spring Hardware Components
saddle_parts.description: SADDLE HARDWARE: A - SADDLE BASE WIRE, B - FRONT LOOP SPRING WITH TENSION PIN, C - UPPER WIRE, D - SADDLE BACK PLATE, E - TRIPPLE COIL SPRING

components.B: Front Loop Spring with Tension Pin

saddle_parts.visual_notes: An exploded layout of raw metallic saddle reconstruction parts showing a heavy chrome base loop chassis (A), a coiled nose-loop shock spring assembly (B), wire structural stabilizers (C), a curved black powder-coated steel backing reinforcement bracket with mounting bolts (D), and loose compression coils (E).

saddle_parts.name: Quick Release Pin
saddle_parts.description: QUICK RELEASE PIN : MADE OF STEEL WITH BLACK PLASTIC COATED LEVER. DIA 8mm OR 5/16 LENTH 45-65mm
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Threaded silver steel binder bolts paired with ergonomic, curved black plastic-tipped thumb levers for tool-free seatpost adjustments.

saddle_parts.name: Seat Clips Assortment
saddle_parts.description: SEAT CLIPS A-B-C DESIGN FOR BMX, SLR, MTB
saddle_parts.visual_notes: Three variations (labeled A, B, and C) of heavy-gauge zinc-plated sheet steel seat rail clamps designed to clamp onto standard dual saddle rails and lock onto standard seatposts.

saddle_parts.name: Seat Pillar / Seatpost Assortment
saddle_parts.description: SEAT PILLAR: A - STANDARD, B - WITH HOLE, C - DOUBLE KNURLING, D - SINGLE KNURLING, E - LONG (STRAIGHT), F - LONG (BENT)
saddle_parts.visual_notes: A collection of tubular steel bicycle seat pillars labeled A through F. Includes standard straight chrome tubes, a variant with a securing hole (B), textured anti-slip knurled patterns on the clamp surfaces (C, D), an elongated straight pillar (E), and a laid-back or offset bent cruiser-style long pillar (F).

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond w/ Heavy Duty Plates
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND W/ HEAVY DUTY PLATES
pedals.visual_notes: Block-style pedal featuring black patterned rubber blocks supported by substantial bright metal outer plates and a central axle spindle.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond w/ Bent Plates
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND W/ BENT PLATES
pedals.visual_notes: Traditional bicycle block pedal with fine diamond-textured black rubber sections enclosed by wrap-around or bent-lip metal cage frames.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND
pedals.visual_notes: Standard classic block pedal utilizing dual textured black rubber gripping surfaces on a metal core chassis.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond (Rubber) Heavy Duty Plates
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND (RUBBER) HEAVY DUTY PLATES
pedals.visual_notes: Robust touring or commuter pedal with textured rubber block tread faces reinforced by rigid dark metallic end and edge bracing plates.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond w/ Edge Plates (Raleigh)
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND W/ EDGE PLATES (RALEIGH)
pedals.visual_notes: Classic vintage Raleigh-style roadster pedal featuring elongated fine-textured rubber blocks inset within sleek parallel chrome edge plates.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond w/ Reflector
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND W/ REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Traditional black rubber block block pedal featuring an integrated amber safety reflector embedded into the outer edge plate.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Fine Diamond w/ Reflector w/ Locking Plates
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : FINE DIAMOND W/ REFLECTOR W / LOCKING PLATES
pedals.visual_notes: Black rubber block pedal featuring a built-in safety reflector and specially structured interlocking metal frame plates.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Bow Type Curved with Reflector
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : BOW TYPE CURVED WITH REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Ergonomic or curved bow-shaped bicycle pedal with wrapped rubber cushioning pads and a side-facing elongated orange reflector.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Big Diamond
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : BIG DIAMOND
pedals.visual_notes: Bicycle pedal utilizing extra-large, deeply raised diamond-patterned rubber teeth on its block blocks for enhanced footwear grip.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Big Diamond w/ Reflector
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : BIG DIAMOND W/ REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Coarse big-diamond tread block pedal equipped with an amber safety reflector strip fastened across the outer end cap plate.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - White Rubber Pedal with Reflector
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : WHITE RUBBER PEDAL WITH REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Distinctive vintage/utility-style pedal featuring clean white rubber tread blocks mounted to a polished chrome central axis spindle.

pedals.name: Rubber Pedal - Reinforced Railway Track
pedals.description: RUBBER PEDALS : REINFORCED RAILWAY TRACK
pedals.visual_notes: Heavy-duty industrial-style utility pedal showing block pads structured with parallel grooved bars mimicking railroad tracks.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB Round
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB ROUND
pedals.visual_notes: Molded black composite mountain bike platform pedal with a rounded outer profile edge and raised gripping studs.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB with Detachable Reflector
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB WITH DETACHABLE REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Black composite resin platform pedal featuring an orange reflector module clipped or bolted onto its front/rear faces.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB Closed Body
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB CLOSED BODY
pedals.visual_notes: Solid-molded, webbed black plastic mountain bike pedal with closed interior structural panels and tooth-like grip borders.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - Big Oval
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : BIG OVAL
pedals.visual_notes: Vibrantly colored bright pink/magenta molded plastic pedal featuring an oblong, large oval skeleton structure.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - Oval
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : OVAL
pedals.visual_notes: Molded black polymer cage pedal in a standard curved oval profile, configured with inner cross reinforcement struts.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB with Non-Slip Surface
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB WITH NON-SLIP SURFACE
pedals.visual_notes: Black composite resin mountain bike pedal with dense micro-texturing or integrated traction ridges on its contact platforms.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - BMX Model
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : BMX MODEL
pedals.visual_notes: Wide, chunky rectangular black plastic platform pedal designed for BMX use, featuring molded traction pins around its perimeter.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - BMX Square
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : BMX SQUARE
pedals.visual_notes: Bright pink/magenta square-shaped blocky BMX platform pedal molded entirely from durable colored plastic.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB Full Moon
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB FULL MOON
pedals.visual_notes: Unique circular or round wheel-shaped black plastic pedal featuring a multi-spoke structural web design.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB Heavy Duty
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB HEAVY DUTY
pedals.visual_notes: Reinforced rectangular black composite resin mountain bike pedal featuring thickened structural walls and serrated tread lips.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - Umbrella Model
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : UMBRELLA MODEL
pedals.visual_notes: Light yellow or semi-translucent cream colored plastic pedal displaying a stylized flared or umbrella-like structural cage pattern.

pedals.name: Plastic Pedal - MTB Cross
pedals.description: PLASTIC PEDALS : MTB CROSS
pedals.visual_notes: Black composite pedal displaying a geometric cage layout with four distinct open quadrants centered on the axle body.

pedals.name: Steel Pedal - Alvoraga (Brazil Model)
pedals.description: STEEL PEDALS : ALVORAGA (BRAZIL MODEL)
pedals.visual_notes: All-metal bicycle pedal consisting of highly polished chrome or stainless steel wrap-around outer loop plates and a metallic core.

pedals.name: Steel Pedal - Steel Plate w/ Reflector Heavy Duty Rubber Blocks
pedals.description: STEEL PEDALS : STEEL PLATE W/ REFLECTOR HEAVY DUTY RUBBER BLOCKS
pedals.visual_notes: Hybrid utility pedal pairing a stamped steel chassis plate with thick, durable black rubber steps and side reflectors.

pedals.name: Steel Pedal - Rat Trap
pedals.description: STEEL PEDALS : RAT TRAP
pedals.visual_notes: Classic metallic 'rat trap' style cage pedal with jagged, tooth-like serrations punched across the top and bottom edge plates for maximum grip.

pedals.name: Steel Pedal - Rat Trap w/ Reflector
pedals.description: STEEL PEDALS : RAT TRAP W/ REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Serrated metal rat-trap pedal assembly fitted with a small rectangular amber safety reflector strip inside the outer safety margin.

pedals.name: Steel Pedal - Steel Cage w/ out Reflector
pedals.description: STEEL PEDALS : STEEL CAGE W/ OUT REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Clean-profile bright zinc or chrome-plated steel cage pedal with smooth/wavy grip boundaries, completely devoid of reflectors.

pedals.name: Steel Pedal - Steel Cage w/ Reflector
pedals.description: STEEL PEDALS : STEEL CAGE W/ REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Shiny chrome-plated steel bicycle cage pedal showing an orange safety reflector integrated on its front or rear face.

pedals.name: Kid Bicycle Pedal - Fine Diamond Rubber 3" with Reflector
pedals.description: PEDALS FOR KID BICYCLES : FINE DIAMOND RUBBER 3" WITH REFLECTOR
pedals.visual_notes: Proportional 3-inch black rubber block pedal configured for youth bicycles, complete with end plate trim and side reflector strips.

pedals.name: Kid Bicycle Pedal - Fine Diamond Rubber 3"
pedals.description: PEDALS FOR KID BICYCLES : FINE DIAMOND RUBBER 3"
pedals.visual_notes: Compact 3-inch children's block pedal constructed with standard fine diamond textured black rubber gripping segments.

pedals.name: Kid Bicycle Pedal - Plastic 3"
pedals.description: PEDALS FOR KID BICYCLES : PLASTIC 3"
pedals.visual_notes: Small 3-inch black molded plastic platform pedal designed with an oval skeleton cage and integrated traction studs for children's shoes.

pedals.name: Kid Bicycle Pedal - Plastic Non-Slip Surface 3"
pedals.description: PEDALS FOR KID BICYCLES : PLASTIC NON-SLIP SURFACE 3"
pedals.visual_notes: A 3-inch children's composite pedal utilizing a dense grain pattern across its flat faces to ensure non-slip foot placements.

pedals.name: Kid Bicycle Pedal - Plastic Butterfly 3"
pedals.description: PEDALS FOR KID BICYCLES : PLASTIC BUTTERFLY 3"
pedals.visual_notes: Bright red 3-inch children's pedal molded in a decorative, flared butterfly wing outline with cross-hatched rib traction.

pedals.name: Moped Pedal - PQT
pedals.description: MOPED PEDALS : PQT
pedals.visual_notes: Heavy-duty, thick black rubber block pedal characterized by bold transverse ribbed patterns, tailored for motorized mopeds.

pedals.name: Moped Pedal - MOPED
pedals.description: MOPED PEDALS : MOPED
pedals.visual_notes: All-rubber tapered wedge pedal block utilizing dual alignment mounting holes at one end, designed for heavy-duty moped cranks.

pedals.name: Moped Pedal - MBK
pedals.description: MOPED PEDALS : MBK
pedals.visual_notes: Stout, blocky black rubber utility pedal displaying dense grip textures, commonly compatible with MBK vintage mopeds.

pedals.name: Pedal Axles
pedals.description: PEDAL SPARES : PEDAL AXLES
pedals.visual_notes: Two replacement steel pedal spindles; the top option (S-293-A) shows a polished silver metallic finish, while the bottom option (S-293-B) features a dark, black oxide finish with integrated shoulder threads.

pedals.name: Pedal Hardware Spares Set
pedals.description: PEDAL SPARES : A TO C - PEDAL CAP OUTER, D - PEDAL CUP REAR, E - PEDAL CONE FRONT
pedals.visual_notes: An assortment of small pedal rebuilding hardware showing three threaded dome outer caps (A, B, C), two pressed washer-style bearing cups (D), and a tiny internal hex/threaded front ball cone (E).

chain_covers.name: Quarter Chain Cover
chain_covers.visual_notes: A minimalist, slender black guard rod or strip designed to run along the upper run of the bicycle chain, featuring a curved downward lip at the rear end.

chain_covers.name: Half Chain Cover
chain_covers.visual_notes: A bright red-orange oblong chain guard covering the outer face of the chain ring and upper/lower chain path, featuring a large circular cutout for the bottom bracket area and a hollowed-out center section.

chain_covers.name: Full Chain Cover
chain_covers.visual_notes: An enclosed black metal chain case with a tapered layout, featuring a small circular aperture for the crank axle, thin concentric decorative accent lines around the drive ring face, and a rear axle slot.

chain_covers.name: French Type Chain Cover
chain_covers.visual_notes: A vibrant blue translucent plastic or painted metal chain guard shaped like a traditional 'pistol' guard, designed to shield the upper portion of the chain and curve downwards around the front chainring.

rims.name: Bicycle Rim - Endric Type Wider Hook Bead
rims.description: RIMS : SEAM WELDED BNCP / POWDER COATED S-305 : ENDRIC TYPE WIDER HOOK BEAD FOR MTB BIKE
rims.visual_notes: Cross-sectional perspective view of a highly polished chrome-plated steel bicycle rim segment, displaying wide flared hook-bead sidewalls and centered spoke drilling holes.

rims.name: Bicycle Rim - Westric Type
rims.description: RIMS : SEAM WELDED BNCP / POWDER COATED S-306 : WESTRIC TYPE
rims.visual_notes: A polished steel rim profile fragment highlighting a boxier, stepped center valley channel and drop-center bead hooks.

rims.name: Bicycle Rim - Westwood Type
rims.description: RIMS : SEAM WELDED BNCP / POWDER COATED S-307 : WESTWOOD TYPE
rims.visual_notes: Classic smooth-contoured Westwood profile rim piece with traditional rolled safety edges, tailored for rod-brake and utility roadster wheels.

rims.name: Bicycle Rim - Endric Type (Small Sizes)
rims.description: RIMS : SEAM WELDED BNCP / POWDER COATED S-308 : ENDRIC TYPE
rims.visual_notes: Narrower chrome-finished steel rim section showing precise inner drop-center wall profiling meant for fractional performance tires.

spokes.name: Bicycle Spokes with Brass Nipples
spokes.description: SPOKES S-309 : MADE FROM HIGH CARBON STEEL EN-8 GALVANISED WITH BRASS NIPPLE.
spokes.visual_notes: A fanned-out arrangement of silver metallic wheel spokes showcasing standard bent J-bend heads gathered together, tapering out to separate threaded brass attachment nipples.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - Raleigh Type
mudguards.visual_notes: A matching set of deep-profile black bicycle mudguards (front and rear) featuring slim, parallel pinstripe detailing down the center line and metallic mounting stays.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - Phillips Type
mudguards.visual_notes: A set of painted reddish-pink/maroon traditional mudguards equipped with contrast light-colored or white safety tips on the trailing edges.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - Phillips Deep Dome Type
mudguards.description: MUDGUARDS : PHILLIPS TYPE : FOR ROADSTER BIKES DEEP DOME SHAPE 28" WHEEL SIZE
mudguards.visual_notes: Classic black heavy-duty mudguards with a highly pronounced, extra-deep dome curvature tailored for classic roadster utility bikes, accented with white tails.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - Balloon Type
mudguards.description: MUDGUARDS : BALLOON TYPE : MTB 24" & 26" WHEEL SIZE
mudguards.visual_notes: Extra-wide profile black matte mudguards built specifically to clear wide-volume mountain bike and balloon tires.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - SLR Centre Ribbed Type
mudguards.description: MUDGUARDS : SLR TYPE : CENTRE RIBBED 20" / 26" WHEEL SIZE
mudguards.visual_notes: Vibrant blue painted mudguards showing a distinct structural raised rib running directly along the center spine, complete with white end-flaps.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - BMX Wheel Type
mudguards.visual_notes: Compact, highly reflective chrome-plated metal mudguard arches scaled down for youth 16-inch and 20-inch bicycle wheels.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - BMX Small
mudguards.visual_notes: Short, cropped polished metallic fender segments with wide flat profiles, meant for minimalist spray protection on BMX/kids bikes.

mudguards.name: Mudguards - Racing Type
mudguards.description: MUDGUARDS : RACING : C27" X 1¼" WHEEL SIZE
mudguards.visual_notes: Ultra-narrow, low-profile polished silver mudguard strips optimized to tightly hug high-pressure 27-inch road racing bicycle tires.

frames.name: MTB Bicycle Frame 19"
frames.description: FRAMES : S-480 : MTB 19" BUILT OF ERW STEEL TUBES MIG WELDED

specifications.availability: Available in various other models and colours as per customer's requirement.

frames.visual_notes: A black diamond-style mountain bike frame featuring red and blue 'SHELCO Deluxe' decals on the seat tube and down tube, complete with integrated cable guides and rear dropouts.

frames.name: French Model Bicycle Frame 21"
frames.description: FRAMES : S-481 : FRENCH MODEL SIZE 21" ERW STEEL BRAZED WITH LUGS FOR DEMI BALLON BICYCLES.

specifications.availability: Available in various other models and colours as per customer's requirement.

frames.visual_notes: A bright blue traditional lugged diamond frame featuring classic geometry, integrated pump pegs on the top tube, and 'SHELCO Deluxe' branding decals.

frames.name: BMX Bicycle Frame

specifications.availability: Available in various other models and colours as per customer's requirement.

frames.visual_notes: A compact BMX frame with a two-tone color gradient fading from bright green at the front to black at the rear dropouts and headtube, decorated with multi-colored branding graphics.

frames.name: Ladies Bicycle Frame 22"
frames.description: FRAMES : S-483 : LADIES 22" CUEVED AND PARALLEL BAR.

specifications.availability: Available in various other models and colours as per customer's requirement.

frames.visual_notes: An all-black step-through style ladies bicycle frame featuring a deeply dropped, curved top tube running parallel to the down tube, embellished with colorful 'SHELCO Deluxe' decals.

frames.name: Roadster Double Bar Bicycle Frame
frames.description: FRAMES : S-484 : ROADSTER BICYCLE 22"/24" DOUBLE BAR.

specifications.availability: Available in various other models and colours as per customer's requirement.
